positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of celestial botanical elements forming a central, mandala-like composition. The design should incorporate swirling nebulae, abstract planetary orbits, glowing crystalline petals, and stylized lunar flora. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep cosmic indigo, electric teal, burnished gold, and clean off-white. The style must be a fusion of intricate Art Nouveau motifs and clean modern vector illustration, emphasizing strong, solid silhouettes and decorative patterns suitable for direct apparel printing. The composition must be perfectly centered, balanced, and scalable.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacting, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, noisy, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, jpeg artifacts
